title: The History of Silk
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text:
Silk has been one of the most valued fabrics throughout human history. According to Chinese legend, the secret of silk production was discovered (0). accident by Empress Leizu around 2700 BCE when a cocoon fell into her tea. She noticed the fine threads and soon (1). the potential of this remarkable material. For centuries, China kept the method of silk production a closely (2). secret, and anyone caught revealing it faced severe punishment.

The fabric became so precious that it (3). as currency along the famous Silk Road, a network of trade routes connecting East and West. Merchants would (4). incredible journeys across deserts and mountains to transport this luxury material. Eventually, the secret (5). out when monks smuggled silkworm eggs to the Byzantine Empire.

Today, silk (6). to be highly prized for clothing and textiles. Modern production methods have made it more accessible, but traditional handmade silk still (7). a premium price. The industry has also had to (8). with environmental concerns, leading to the development of more sustainable practices.

example.explanation: 'By accident' es una expresión fija que significa 'por casualidad'.

questions.explanation: 'Recognise the potential' es la colocación correcta para expresar que alguien percibe el valor de algo.
'Closely guarded secret' es una expresión fija para describir un secreto muy bien protegido.
'Serve as' significa 'funcionar como' o 'servir de' en este contexto.
'Undertake a journey' es la colocación correcta para emprender un viaje.
'Leak out' es un phrasal verb que significa que información secreta se filtra o escapa.
'Continue to be' expresa que algo sigue siendo de cierta manera.
'Command a price' es una colocación fija que significa alcanzar o exigir un precio.
'Deal with' es el phrasal verb correcto para expresar enfrentar o manejar problemas.
